name: Gathering Network
description: Resource loops for wood, crops, water, and region-specific materials.
playerValue: Clear short-to-mid progression and meaningful daily activity.
builderValue: Control scarcity and pacing to match your realm's economy.

name: Crafting Chains
description: Multi-step recipe systems that support specialization and collaboration.
playerValue: Long-term goals and stronger identity through professions.
builderValue: Enable class-like depth without locking players into one path.

name: Player Economy
description: Trade-ready outputs and market-oriented loops that reward social play.
playerValue: Craft, trade, and build value through relationships.

name: Region Servers
description: Infrastructure updates designed to support larger and evolving worlds.
playerValue: More stable and consistent progression experience.
builderValue: Better reliability as your region scales.

name: Recipe Expansion Pipeline
description: Frequent additions like backpack recipes, potion bottling, and food workflows.
playerValue: Fresh goals and renewed reason to return.
builderValue: Seasonal content cadence without full-system rewrites.

name: Event-Compatible Design
description: Systems that pair naturally with roleplay arcs, competitions, and social events.
playerValue: More social moments and memorable story beats.
builderValue: A practical framework for recurring engagement events.
